8019_s21_qp_01.1: To what extent is it important for your country to have a good relationship with its neighbours?
8019_s21_qp_01.2: Evaluate the extent to which sport has become too competitive.
8019_s21_qp_01.3: The human rights of an individual should be given priority in society. Discuss.
8019_s21_qp_01.4: Examine whether or not advances in scientific research have enabled humans to live healthier lives.
8019_s21_qp_01.5: To what extent have human activities unnecessarily destroyed the natural environment of your country?
8019_s21_qp_01.6: It is now possible for couples who cannot conceive naturally to have children. To what extent is this a positive development?
8019_s21_qp_01.7: To what extent is it necessary to monitor the content of social media?
8019_s21_qp_01.8: Creativity is only to be found in the various types of artistic expression. To what extent do you agree?
8019_s21_qp_01.9: Evaluate the extent to which books about remarkable people or events can inspire their readers.
8019_s21_qp_01.10: To what extent is music used for purposes other than entertainment in your country?

8019_w22_qp_1.1: The main purpose of education is to enable people to get a good job. Discuss.
8019_w22_qp_1.2: To what extent is having faith in something or someone very important to the people of your country?
8019_w22_qp_1.3: Assess the extent to which one person can change the course of events in society.
8019_w22_qp_1.4: Assess how effectively the problem of household waste is being dealt with in your country.
8019_w22_qp_1.5: Water presents more of a threat than a benefit to the future of the world. Discuss.
8019_w22_qp_1.6: Assess the benefits of going on holiday in your own country, rather than travelling abroad.
8019_w22_qp_1.7: Literature should explore the less acceptable parts of human behaviour. Examine this statement.
8019_w22_qp_1.8: Assess the extent to which traditional arts and crafts should be preserved in your country.
8019_w22_qp_1.9: The main purpose of films is to entertain. Evaluate this view.
8019_w22_qp_1.10: Evaluate whether having a global language would lead to a more united world.

8019_w23_qp_1.1: Evaluate the influence that the performing arts have on young people.
8019_w23_qp_1.2: To what extent is it important for work to be enjoyable?
8019_w23_qp_1.3: Sports personalities have a very positive influence on others. To what extent is this true?
8019_w23_qp_1.4: Evaluate how successful your country has been in reducing pollution in its towns and cities.
8019_w23_qp_1.5: Evaluate whether playing video games is beneficial to people.
8019_w23_qp_1.6: It is not necessary to study mathematics after primary school. Discuss.
8019_w23_qp_1.7: Examine whether there should be any limits to medical experimentation.
8019_w23_qp_1.8: The popularity of a film or movie depends upon how it is publicised. Discuss.
8019_w23_qp_1.9: To what extent should parents in your country be responsible for limiting the amount of advertising their children see?
8019_w23_qp_1.10: A successful democracy needs the active involvement of its citizens. To what extent is this important in your country?

8019_w24_qp_1.1: A good book will challenge the reader's view of the world. Evaluate this claim.
8019_w24_qp_1.2: To what extent has your country done enough to manage its environmental problems?
8019_w24_qp_1.3: To what extent is achievement in education restricted by a student’s family and social circumstances?
8019_w24_qp_1.4: International sporting events bring no benefits to the host countries. Discuss.
8019_w24_qp_1.5: ‘A government always acts in the interests of the wealthy.’ To what extent might this be true in your country?
8019_w24_qp_1.6: Digital learning is the most effective way of educating young people. Discuss.
8019_w24_qp_1.7: To what extent is public transport an effective way to travel in your country?
8019_w24_qp_1.8: Music is better experienced with other people. Discuss.
8019_w24_qp_1.9: Mathematics is fun. To what extent do you agree?
8019_w24_qp_1.10: To what extent is the world a much safer place now than in the past?

8019_w25_qp_01.1: The management of personal finance should be a compulsory part of the school curriculum in your country. Discuss.
8019_w25_qp_01.2: Assess the view that print media is no longer needed in today’s world of digital devices.
8019_w25_qp_01.3: To what extent are traditional attitudes delaying progress in your country?
8019_w25_qp_01.4: ‘Violence used for political reasons has always existed.’ Assess whether or not such violence is justified.
8019_w25_qp_01.5: Evaluate how data and statistics can help people to make important choices in their lives.
8019_w25_qp_01.6: It is better to live in one location for your whole life. Discuss.
8019_w25_qp_01.7: People participate in sporting activities mainly to improve their mental health. Discuss.
8019_w25_qp_01.8: Advertising is unnecessary if the product is good enough. Evaluate this claim.
8019_w25_qp_01.9: To what extent is it the responsibility of young people to protect the Earth’s environment?
8019_w25_qp_01.10: To what extent is censorship of films/movies necessary?

8021_m21_qp_12.1: The most important role of a parent is to teach their child moral values. Discuss.
8021_m21_qp_12.2: To what extent has globalisation brought only benefits to your country?
8021_m21_qp_12.3: Evaluate the view that professional sport has become dangerously obsessed with money.
8021_m21_qp_12.4: It is impossible to maintain privacy in an online environment. Discuss.
8021_m21_qp_12.5: Only an increase in food production can ensure enough food is available to meet everyone’s needs. To what extent do you agree?
8021_m21_qp_12.6: The only way to reduce pollution is to regulate and penalise the companies and countries responsible. Discuss.
8021_m21_qp_12.7: Evaluate the view that computer technology makes it much easier to learn another language.
8021_m21_qp_12.8: Music has a significant impact on society and individuals. To what extent do you agree?
8021_m21_qp_12.9: To what extent do you agree that all buildings of historical significance should be preserved in your country?
8021_m21_qp_12.10: Evaluate the extent to which works of fiction rely on the personal experiences of the author.

8021_m22_qp_12.1: An effective leader needs to be a good listener. Evaluate this statement.
8021_m22_qp_12.2: Strong religious belief can be both beneficial and damaging. Discuss.
8021_m22_qp_12.3: Assess the view that unpaid voluntary work benefits the participants more than it benefits the people the participants are trying to help.
8021_m22_qp_12.4: Evaluate the view that education does not encourage creativity.
8021_m22_qp_12.5: To what extent has space exploration benefitted humankind?
8021_m22_qp_12.6: The movement of people from the countryside to cities cannot be sustained. Discuss.
8021_m22_qp_12.7: To what extent has modern technology allowed people to spend their money more effectively?
8021_m22_qp_12.8: To what extent can children’s literature be enjoyed by adults?
8021_m22_qp_12.9: Evaluate the need for censorship in films and television.
8021_m22_qp_12.10: Assess how successfully recycled materials are used for arts and crafts in your country.

8021_m23_qp_12.1: Discuss the ways that overpopulation is the most serious threat to the world today.
8021_m23_qp_12.2: The only way to achieve equality in society is for the rich to pay more tax. Discuss.
8021_m23_qp_12.3: It can never be justified to prevent a person from receiving an education. Discuss.
8021_m23_qp_12.4: There is no longer any justification for humans to eat meat. Discuss.
8021_m23_qp_12.5: Not enough is being done to prevent the loss of life caused by natural disasters. Examine this statement.
8021_m23_qp_12.6: Modern technology has done little to prevent crime. Discuss.
8021_m23_qp_12.7: The increasing use of social media is damaging people’s communication skills. Discuss.
8021_m23_qp_12.8: Nature is always presented positively in books, paintings and music. To what extent do you agree?
8021_m23_qp_12.9: To what extent are traditional arts and crafts a vital part of your country’s heritage?
8021_m23_qp_12.10: To what extent can advertising be trusted?

8021_m24_qp_12.1: For many people, the past is more appealing than the present or the future. Discuss.
8021_m24_qp_12.2: Evaluate the view that it is justifiable to use animals in scientific research.
8021_m24_qp_12.3: Water is becoming a major reason for conflict between nations. Discuss.
8021_m24_qp_12.4: To what extent are workers’ rights respected in your country?
8021_m24_qp_12.5: All countries are now better prepared to prevent the spread of disease. Evaluate this statement.
8021_m24_qp_12.6: Tourism always has a damaging effect on the environment. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_m24_qp_12.7: To what extent do you agree that reading is the best way to acquire knowledge?
8021_m24_qp_12.8: Using statistical data is crucial when making decisions. Discuss.
8021_m24_qp_12.9: To what extent does online news remove the need for printed newspapers?
8021_m24_qp_12.10: Participation in drama or other performing arts brings only benefits to young people. Discuss.

8021_m25_qp_12.1: International aid never reaches those communities that are most in need. Discuss.
8021_m25_qp_12.2: Evaluate the view that increasing surveillance threatens people’s privacy.
8021_m25_qp_12.3: People achieve more success working in a group than on their own. Discuss.
8021_m25_qp_12.4: A person’s welfare is the responsibility of their family. To what extent is this true in your country?
8021_m25_qp_12.5: Not enough is being done in your country to tackle climate change. Discuss.
8021_m25_qp_12.6: To what extent is migration from rural to urban areas beneficial to a country?
8021_m25_qp_12.7: Clinical trials for new medications should always be ethical. Discuss.
8021_m25_qp_12.8: To what extent are works of non-fiction more important than fictional works?
8021_m25_qp_12.9: The ability to communicate in more than one language is unnecessary. Discuss.
8021_m25_qp_12.10: Evaluate the importance of live music to people in your country.

8021_s19_qp_11.1: Evaluate the contribution of any politician or political party to the development of your country.
8021_s19_qp_11.2: ‘Animals should be given the same rights as humans.’ Discuss.
8021_s19_qp_11.3: Evaluate the importance of public sports facilities for a society that is increasingly inactive.
8021_s19_qp_11.4: Assess the most efficient ways of transporting people and goods in your country.
8021_s19_qp_11.5: Internet activity can be easily monitored. Examine whether or not this gives any person or organisation the right to know what other people are doing online.
8021_s19_qp_11.6: Assess whether or not sources of renewable energy offer a necessary and viable alternative to fossil fuels.
8021_s19_qp_11.7: To what extent is the media in your country biased?
8021_s19_qp_11.8: ‘Music is a universal and unifying language.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s19_qp_11.9: ‘Going to a theatre to experience a live event is far more enjoyable and interesting than going to a cinema.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s19_qp_11.10: ‘When power leads man towards arrogance, poetry reminds him of his limitations.’ (John F Kennedy) To what extent do you agree?

8021_s19_qp_12.1: Evaluate the actions which could be taken in your country to improve the welfare of disadvantaged people.
8021_s19_qp_12.2: ‘Prison is ineffective in deterring criminal activity and rehabilitating offenders.’ Examine the possible alternatives to prison sentences.
8021_s19_qp_12.3: ‘The joy of sport is in taking part, rather than watching.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s19_qp_12.4: ‘Not enough is being done to tackle the problems of waste disposal.’ To what extent is this the case in your country?
8021_s19_qp_12.5: ‘The overuse of antibiotics has made them less effective.’ To what extent is this a serious threat to health?
8021_s19_qp_12.6: Assess whether or not mobile phones have improved human communication.
8021_s19_qp_12.7: To what extent should television and radio be independent of government control in your country?
8021_s19_qp_12.8: ‘Monsters in films, fairy tales and books force us to imagine the worst about ourselves.’ Evaluate this statement with reference to at least two examples.
8021_s19_qp_12.9: ‘It is important for cultures to preserve their traditional beliefs and customs.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s19_qp_12.10: ‘Free medical care is a fundamental right of all citizens in every country.’ To what extent do you agree?

8021_s19_qp_13.1: ‘In the production of food, animal welfare should be a higher priority than cost.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s19_qp_13.2: ‘International organisations, such as the World Health Organization and the International Monetary Fund, have become more important in recent years.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s19_qp_13.3: ‘Inequality in life expectancy between the rich and poor is growing.’ To what extent is health the responsibility of the individual?
8021_s19_qp_13.4: Assess whether it is important that areas of natural beauty should be preserved and protected in your country.
8021_s19_qp_13.5: ‘It is difficult to justify spending money on space exploration while poverty exists.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s19_qp_13.6: ‘Social media is now one of the main forms of communication.’ Assess the impact of this on society today.
8021_s19_qp_13.7: ‘News media cannot be trusted to report the truth.’ To what extent is this the case in your country?
8021_s19_qp_13.8: ‘Works of art are not just found in museums and galleries, but everywhere around us.’ Evaluate this statement.
8021_s19_qp_13.9: ‘Cookery is the only art form available to everyone.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s19_qp_13.10: Identify an author from your country and justify the study of one or more of their works in schools.

8021_s20_qp_11.1: Assess whether it is possible, or desirable, to revive industries which have declined.
8021_s20_qp_11.2: ‘Engineers make a positive contribution to our lives today.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s20_qp_11.3: To what extent is military spending justifiable when so many people live in poverty?
8021_s20_qp_11.4: ‘Unlimited power is likely to corrupt the minds of those who possess it.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s20_qp_11.5: ‘Mathematics is the language of science and art.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s20_qp_11.6: To what extent do you agree that an obsession with health is unhealthy?
8021_s20_qp_11.7: To what extent might freedom increase if people turned off their mobile phones and computer screens?
8021_s20_qp_11.8: Evaluate the effectiveness of film or literature in portraying the reality of your country.
8021_s20_qp_11.9: Evaluate the importance of festivals and celebrations in uniting the people of your country.
8021_s20_qp_11.10: To what extent has the communication of news been revolutionised in your country in the last 50 years?

8021_s20_qp_12.1: ‘The provision of foreign aid by wealthier nations is motivated as much by self-interest as by a desire to help.’ Assess this view.
8021_s20_qp_12.2: ‘The hunting of wild animals should be discouraged.’ Discuss.
8021_s20_qp_12.3: ‘Education is the most important factor in increasing social and economic opportunities.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s20_qp_12.4: To what extent is knowledge of the past a good guide to future events?
8021_s20_qp_12.5: Computer hacking is the greatest threat for the communication of information on the internet. Discuss.
8021_s20_qp_12.6: Assess the advantages and disadvantages of free health care for all.
8021_s20_qp_12.7: ‘It is more desirable to live in a city than in a rural area.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s20_qp_12.8: ‘Autobiographies are more reliable than biographies.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s20_qp_12.9: ‘National celebrations, rather than uniting people, can divide them.’ To what extent do you agree with reference to your country?
8021_s20_qp_12.10: Evaluate the importance of the live music and/or theatre experience for both performer and audience.

8021_s20_qp_13.2: To what extent should schools be allowed to decide their own curriculum?
8021_s20_qp_13.3: To what extent has the world become a ‘global village’?
8021_s20_qp_13.4: ‘In the digital age, we are more reliably informed than we have ever been.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_s20_qp_13.5: ‘Our oceans are becoming choked with plastic debris, causing damage to all forms of life.’ Evaluate the possible solutions to this environmental issue.
8021_s20_qp_13.6: To what extent do you agree that tourists should not be encouraged to visit remote parts of the world?
8021_s20_qp_13.7: ‘Scientific research and development could eventually increase human life expectancy to 150 years.’ To what extent is this desirable in your country?
8021_s20_qp_13.8: ‘Sculpture has existed since early times.’ Evaluate the cultural significance of this art form.
8021_s20_qp_13.9: Examine whether or not the reading of fiction enhances our understanding of human nature. You should refer to novels you have read.
8021_s20_qp_13.10: Examine whether objects that are used every day should be beautiful as well as useful.

8021_s21_qp_11.1: A business’s main aim is to maximise profits. Discuss.
8021_s21_qp_11.2: War is only ever destructive and brings nothing good. Evaluate this view.
8021_s21_qp_11.3: To what extent should the ability to use Information Technology be education’s top priority?
8021_s21_qp_11.4: Human actions can prevent all natural disasters. Evaluate this view.
8021_s21_qp_11.5: Careful testing is the most important consideration when developing new medicines. Discuss.
8021_s21_qp_11.6: To what extent do you agree that space tourism is a waste of precious resources?
8021_s21_qp_11.7: Museums and/or art galleries are no longer required now we can view their contents online. Discuss.
8021_s21_qp_11.8: Censorship of any form of artistic expression is unjustifiable. Discuss.
8021_s21_qp_11.9: Targeted online advertising is nothing more than an invasion of privacy. Discuss.
8021_s21_qp_11.10: It is no longer necessary to learn to write by hand. Discuss.

8021_s21_qp_12.1: To what extent do you agree that democracy is the most effective way of governing a society?
8021_s21_qp_12.2: In sport, individual skill and talent are more important than teamwork. Discuss.
8021_s21_qp_12.3: To what extent is a person’s identity defined by the geography of where they live?
8021_s21_qp_12.4: The use of data alone is not enough to ensure accurate decision-making. Discuss.
8021_s21_qp_12.5: Examine whether there should be any limits to the advances of medical science.
8021_s21_qp_12.6: To what extent should your country protect the environment when continuing to develop its transport system?
8021_s21_qp_12.7: Among all the other threats to humanity’s survival, the destruction of the forests is the greatest. To what extent is this true?
8021_s21_qp_12.8: Music that is popular today is heavily influenced by the past. Discuss.
8021_s21_qp_12.9: In attempting to translate from one language into another, something will always be lost. How far do you agree?
8021_s21_qp_12.10: News that is free of censorship is the only way that people can find out the truth. Discuss.

8021_s21_qp_13.1: Countries with the largest armed forces always have an advantage. Evaluate this view.
8021_s21_qp_13.2: To what extent do individuals have control over their own futures?
8021_s21_qp_13.3: The main purpose of education is to prepare people for the world of work. Discuss.
8021_s21_qp_13.4: Evaluate the extent to which recent scientific developments have improved people’s lives in your country.
8021_s21_qp_13.5: Using a telephone is the best way of communicating. To what extent do you agree?
8021_s21_qp_13.6: To what extent might it be possible to prevent future famine?
8021_s21_qp_13.7: Evaluate the benefits of staying at home during your annual holiday, rather than visiting a foreign country.
8021_s21_qp_13.8: Explain why artists, such as painters, filmmakers or musicians, are often inspired by terrible events in human history.
8021_s21_qp_13.9: Museums have no right to hold and exhibit items that belong to other countries. Discuss.
8021_s21_qp_13.10: Advertising is losing its influence on people in the world today. To what extent do you agree?

8021_s22_qp_11.1: To what extent is history based on lies rather than facts?
8021_s22_qp_11.2: There are no great leaders in the world today. Discuss.
8021_s22_qp_11.3: To what extent are timed examinations a fair means of assessment?
8021_s22_qp_11.4: Governments should be responsible for funding a nation’s performing arts. Discuss.
8021_s22_qp_11.5: Using a telephone is the best way of communicating. To what extent do you agree?
8021_s22_qp_11.6: To what extent is it necessary to reduce the number of vehicles on the roads of your country?
8021_s22_qp_11.7: There should be no limits to a country’s surveillance of its citizens. Discuss.
8021_s22_qp_11.8: To what extent do films have to be realistic to be enjoyable?
8021_s22_qp_11.9: Evaluate whether poets have any role to play in society.
8021_s22_qp_11.10: The media has become a dangerous part of daily life. To what extent do you agree?

8021_s22_qp_12.1: Nations and peoples should always forgive the wrongs of the past. Evaluate this view.
8021_s22_qp_12.2: The most successful businesses make the biggest profits. Discuss.
8021_s22_qp_12.3: To what extent has traditional family life lost its importance in your country?
8021_s22_qp_12.4: Fossil fuel extraction belongs in the past not the future. Evaluate this statement.
8021_s22_qp_12.5: To what extent has migration harmed the development of your country?
8021_s22_qp_12.6: Evaluate how important it is for a person’s health, to spend time in the natural world.
8021_s22_qp_12.7: Poetry is irrelevant in the modern world. To what extent do you agree?
8021_s22_qp_12.8: Attending a live performance is the best way to experience music. Evaluate this statement.
8021_s22_qp_12.9: To what extent do television programmes have a negative influence on people?
8021_s22_qp_12.10: Assess the importance of learning a second language.

8021_s22_qp_13.1: Countries with poor human rights records should not be allowed to host international sporting events. Discuss.
8021_s22_qp_13.2: Studying local history is as important as world history. Discuss.
8021_s22_qp_13.3: Assess whether a one-party system is an effective form of government.
8021_s22_qp_13.4: To what extent is it possible for governments to protect their people from the effects of natural disasters?
8021_s22_qp_13.5: Examine the extent to which information and communications technology is having a negative impact on your country.
8021_s22_qp_13.6: Evaluate the effectiveness of public transport provision in your country.
8021_s22_qp_13.7: Evaluate the importance of ‘the hero/heroine’ to readers of fiction books.
8021_s22_qp_13.8: Illustrations and pictures are as important as the written word in communicating ideas. Discuss.
8021_s22_qp_13.9: Assess the extent to which music can influence a person’s life.
8021_s22_qp_13.10: News media must always tell the truth. To what extent do you agree?

8021_s23_qp_11.1: Exploration of the oceans is vital for the survival of the planet. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_11.2: Advertising is ineffective without visual images. To what extent do you agree?
8021_s23_qp_11.3: Television will always be the most popular form of entertainment. To what extent do you agree?
8021_s23_qp_11.4: To what extent is further development of renewable energy desirable in your country?
8021_s23_qp_11.5: The removal of works of art from public view is necessary when what they represent is now seen as unacceptable. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_11.6: To what extent are all disabled people provided for in your country?
8021_s23_qp_11.7: The use of animals in sport can never be justified. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_11.8: Democracy is the best form of government. Evaluate this view.
8021_s23_qp_11.9: Genuine friendships can never be made only online. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_11.10: To what extent do richer nations have a responsibility to help the world’s poor?

8021_s23_qp_12.1: Assess whether your country’s traditions are holding back its development.
8021_s23_qp_12.2: Assess whether countries still need armed forces in order to remain powerful in today’s world.
8021_s23_qp_12.3: Examine the impact of international aid on ending world poverty.
8021_s23_qp_12.4: To discover and learn, it is necessary to travel. Evaluate this statement.
8021_s23_qp_12.5: It is every parent’s responsibility to ensure that their children have a healthy lifestyle. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_12.6: Trees have little importance in our increasingly developed world. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_12.7: Mobile devices designed to connect people actually increase social isolation. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_12.8: The main purpose of architecture is to add beauty to the environment. To what extent do you agree?
8021_s23_qp_12.9: The best way to watch a movie is at home. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_12.10: To what extent do visual arts play a vital role in today’s world?

8021_s23_qp_13.1: To what extent is working entirely from home preferable?
8021_s23_qp_13.2: The rights of minority groups should be supported in your country. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_13.3: Companies that manufacture medicines are only interested in profit. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_13.4: To what extent can human societies learn valuable lessons from the natural world?
8021_s23_qp_13.5: With reference to your country, evaluate which environmental issue should have the highest priority.
8021_s23_qp_13.6: To what extent do you agree that people should avoid eating genetically modified foods?
8021_s23_qp_13.7: To what extent is the shortage of housing a problem in cities around the world?
8021_s23_qp_13.8: To what extent does dance play an important role in the life of your country?
8021_s23_qp_13.9: Digital media does more harm than good. Discuss.
8021_s23_qp_13.10: Assess the view that the main aim of children’s fiction is to encourage a love of reading.

8021_s24_qp_11.1: Not enough is being done to ensure safety at sporting events. To what extent do you agree with this view?
8021_s24_qp_11.2: Wealthy celebrities have a duty to give time and money to charitable causes. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_s24_qp_11.3: To what extent can a nation’s written constitution safeguard people’s rights?
8021_s24_qp_11.4: To what extent should war always be the last option when countries attempt to resolve conflicts?
8021_s24_qp_11.5: The problems caused by tourism are always greater than the benefits. Examine this statement.
8021_s24_qp_11.6: Artificial intelligence should be welcomed not feared. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_s24_qp_11.7: Assess the importance of mathematics in education.
8021_s24_qp_11.8: Reading more books would have a positive impact on society. Discuss.
8021_s24_qp_11.9: Evaluate the view that the arts should not be about making money.
8021_s24_qp_11.10: To what extent has technology had a negative impact on the music industry?

8021_s24_qp_12.1: To what extent do schools in your country encourage creativity?
8021_s24_qp_12.2: To what extent has science made the lives of people easier?
8021_s24_qp_12.3: People do not need a lot of money to be happy. Evaluate this statement.
8021_s24_qp_12.4: To what extent should more be done to prepare for possible natural disasters in your country?
8021_s24_qp_12.5: Political leaders create fear rather than hope. Discuss.
8021_s24_qp_12.6: To what extent is it important to be tolerant of the beliefs of others?
8021_s24_qp_12.7: To what extent has satellite technology improved the lives of people in your country?
8021_s24_qp_12.8: Stories written in the past still have relevance today. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_s24_qp_12.9: Television has no educational benefits. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_s24_qp_12.10: Musicians not only make music, but also make a significant contribution to society and culture. Discuss.

8021_s24_qp_13.1: History is always written from the point of view of the powerful. Discuss.
8021_s24_qp_13.2: To what extent is financial management the responsibility of the individual?
8021_s24_qp_13.3: Assess the importance of everyone in a community being a good neighbour.
8021_s24_qp_13.4: To what extent should humans be responsible for the welfare of animals?
8021_s24_qp_13.5: Food is a work of art not just a necessity. Discuss.
8021_s24_qp_13.6: To what extent has online shopping improved people’s lives?
8021_s24_qp_13.7: Surveillance is only justified in the pursuit of criminals. Discuss.
8021_s24_qp_13.8: Evaluate the importance of traditional stories to the people of your country.
8021_s24_qp_13.9: Learning is more effective when students travel to places outside the classroom. Discuss.
8021_s24_qp_13.10: Free speech should mean that news media is never censored. To what extent do you agree with this statement?

8021_s25_qp_11.1: To what extent does the government provide effective public services to the people of your country?
8021_s25_qp_11.2: Discuss the view that the news media should never be censored in your country.
8021_s25_qp_11.3: To what extent are art galleries and museums still necessary?
8021_s25_qp_11.4: Marriage is no longer necessary in modern society. Evaluate this view.
8021_s25_qp_11.5: New medicines should always be fully tested before people use them. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_s25_qp_11.6: To what extent is your country adequately prepared for natural disasters?
8021_s25_qp_11.7: All new house-building projects should include some green spaces within their plans. Evaluate this view.
8021_s25_qp_11.8: Advertising has become an unwelcome feature of our lives. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_s25_qp_11.9: People should be allowed to protest in any way they choose. Evaluate this statement.
8021_s25_qp_11.10: International aid benefits the people providing the aid more than the people receiving it. Discuss

8021_s25_qp_12.1: Governments should prioritise the needs of people living in rural areas over the needs of people living in cities. Discuss.
8021_s25_qp_12.2: To what extent do traditional arts and crafts provide an understanding of your country’s history?
8021_s25_qp_12.3: The world is more divided now than ever. Examine this statement.
8021_s25_qp_12.4: Prisons play a positive role in keeping societies safe. Evaluate this view.
8021_s25_qp_12.5: Online learning is the future of education. Discuss.
8021_s25_qp_12.6: To what extent has genetic engineering positively changed people’s lives?
8021_s25_qp_12.7: The lack of clean water is a significant threat to human survival. Discuss.
8021_s25_qp_12.8: Works of fiction have no relevance to the reality of everyday life. Evaluate this statement.
8021_s25_qp_12.9: Effective censorship of the media is not possible today. Discuss.
8021_s25_qp_12.10: To what extent do you agree that it is possible to achieve equality of wealth in your country?

8021_s25_qp_13.1: Everyone must help their country in times of war. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_s25_qp_13.2: To what extent should towns be designed to support people’s needs?
8021_s25_qp_13.3: Non-fiction books will never be as popular as fiction books. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_s25_qp_13.4: Evaluate the view that the aim of prison should be to improve people rather than punish them.
8021_s25_qp_13.5: The rights of people to protest on the streets should always be protected. Examine this statement.
8021_s25_qp_13.6: To what extent has globalisation improved people’s lives in your country?
8021_s25_qp_13.7: Government investment is essential for local community arts to survive. Discuss.
8021_s25_qp_13.8: To what extent does a plant-based diet ensure a healthy lifestyle?
8021_s25_qp_13.9: Actors playing leading roles in movies are too often chosen for their physical appearance. Discuss.
8021_s25_qp_13.10: To what extent is the introduction of electric vehicles a positive development?

8021_w19_qp_11.1: ‘Families are less united than they have ever been.’ Discuss this statement with reference to family values in your country.
8021_w19_qp_11.2: ‘Democracy is the ideal form of government but it is very difficult to achieve.’ Assess this statement.
8021_w19_qp_11.3: ‘Wealth and happiness have nothing to do with income.’ Discuss.
8021_w19_qp_11.4: Evaluate the actions which could be taken to solve the most serious environmental problem in your country.
8021_w19_qp_11.5: Modified animal organs could soon be transplanted into humans. To what extent is this desirable?
8021_w19_qp_11.6: Evaluate the implications for individuals and society of a world that depends on information technology.
8021_w19_qp_11.7: Discuss whether the performing arts are important to the culture of your country.
8021_w19_qp_11.8: Examine whether or not the reading of fiction enhances our understanding of human nature. You should refer to novels you have read.
8021_w19_qp_11.9: ‘Freedom of the media is important in a democracy.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w19_qp_11.10: ‘An uneducated society has never existed.’ Discuss.

8021_w19_qp_12.1: Assess the reasons for the decline of religious observance in some societies.
8021_w19_qp_12.2: ‘The legacy of colonialism is alive today in many forms.’ Discuss.
8021_w19_qp_12.3: To what extent is continued global population growth sustainable and desirable?
8021_w19_qp_12.4: ‘Beautiful spaces enhance personal well-being.’ Examine whether such spaces are valued and maintained in your country.
8021_w19_qp_12.5: Scientists can now successfully edit genes in human embryos. Assess the advantages and disadvantages of this.
8021_w19_qp_12.6: Discuss whether an individual’s online activity should be monitored in the fight against crime and terrorism.
8021_w19_qp_12.7: Examine how important it is that the production of traditional crafts continues in your country.
8021_w19_qp_12.8: ‘Fascination with the sea is common among writers, composers and artists.’ With reference to any forms of artistic expression, suggest why the sea might provide inspiration.
8021_w19_qp_12.9: ‘Television advertising rarely tells the truth.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w19_qp_12.10: Identify the unique characteristics of a city in your country and explain the extent to which these characteristics are significant.

8021_w19_qp_13.1: Examine whether or not the human race might benefit from the development of more technologically advanced weapons.
8021_w19_qp_13.2: ‘Sport can unite people as well as divide them.’ Discuss.
8021_w19_qp_13.3: ‘Religious belief in the existence of a creator cannot be based on an argument or scientific investigation.’ Discuss.
8021_w19_qp_13.4: To what extent are the problems of traffic congestion being effectively dealt with in your country?
8021_w19_qp_13.5: ‘Mathematical accuracy is unnecessary in everyday life.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w19_qp_13.6: ‘Facial recognition software and similar technologies may threaten the rights of individuals.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w19_qp_13.7: To what extent do you agree that the government of your country should give substantial financial support to the arts and crafts?
8021_w19_qp_13.8: ‘There should be no censorship of the arts.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w19_qp_13.9: To what extent do you agree that the continued use of minority languages should be encouraged?
8021_w19_qp_13.10: The government of Qatar has laid down the following domestic guidelines: use leftovers, eat plants, cook at home, conserve water. Suggest whether or not your country should adopt such an approach.

8021_w20_qp_11.1: Evaluate the effectiveness of rehabilitation in the justice system of your country.
8021_w20_qp_11.2: ‘There is more to being a good citizen than showing respect and consideration for others.’ Discuss with reference to your country.
8021_w20_qp_11.3: ‘Knowledge of historical events does not help us to plan for the future.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_11.4: To what extent has increased internet use caused problems for law enforcement agencies?
8021_w20_qp_11.5: ‘Without good health it is still possible to lead a fulfilling life.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_11.6: Evaluate what you consider to be the most significant future impacts of climate change.
8021_w20_qp_11.7: ‘The most important quality of a work of art is its appeal to the audience.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_11.8: ‘Journalists should not interfere in the lives of celebrities.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_11.9: ‘Film adaptations of books are rarely as successful as the original writing.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_11.10: ‘Melody is essential to music.’ Discuss this view with reference to music you know well.

8021_w20_qp_12.1: Assess how effectively the government of your country looks after the welfare of its people.
8021_w20_qp_12.2: ‘Physical activities in schools are essential aspects of education.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_12.3: ‘The struggle for equal rights can never be won.’ Discuss.
8021_w20_qp_12.4: ‘The modern world encourages self-interest rather than responsibility for others.’ Assess this view.
8021_w20_qp_12.5: ‘Some developments in medicine appear to ignore ethical issues.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_12.6: ‘The modern world is obsessed with statistics.’ Assess the risks of only using statistics when making important decisions.
8021_w20_qp_12.7: ‘The human race is powerless when faced with natural disasters.’ Discuss.
8021_w20_qp_12.8: To what extent are languages a barrier to world cooperation in your country?
8021_w20_qp_12.9: To what extent are pictures more powerful than words?
8021_w20_qp_12.10: ‘The most memorable music is that which tells a story.’ Discuss.

8021_w20_qp_13.1: Evaluate the qualities required for a successful government.
8021_w20_qp_13.2: ‘There should be more acknowledgement of women’s involvement in sport.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_13.3: ‘The main responsibility for health education lies with schools.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_13.4: Examine how young people can be inspired to become scientists and mathematicians in your country.
8021_w20_qp_13.5: ‘Medical research should only be concerned with finding cures for the world’s deadliest diseases.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_13.6: ‘Genetically modified food is the only solution to world hunger.’ Discuss.
8021_w20_qp_13.7: ‘Blogs are the most reliable source of information.’ Discuss.
8021_w20_qp_13.8: ‘As the world becomes more of a global community, it is important to preserve traditional cultures in your country.’ To what extent do you agree?
8021_w20_qp_13.9: To what extent do you agree that films, literature or paintings can only reflect the real world?
8021_w20_qp_13.10: ‘This music captures the times we live in.’ Evaluate whether the music you listen to does this.

8021_w21_qp_11.1: Evaluate the necessity for online communications in running a business.
8021_w21_qp_11.2: Voting in national and regional elections should be a legal requirement. Discuss.
8021_w21_qp_11.3: To what extent does sport produce good role models?
8021_w21_qp_11.4: A country’s continued development depends on the quality of education it provides. Discuss.
8021_w21_qp_11.5: To what extent does tourism make a positive contribution to your country’s economy?
8021_w21_qp_11.6: It is possible to live a healthy lifestyle without being careful about what we eat. Discuss.
8021_w21_qp_11.7: Technology can never fully replace people. To what extent do you agree?
8021_w21_qp_11.8: Newspapers in your country should not be allowed to publish the views of just one person or organisation. Discuss.
8021_w21_qp_11.9: Examine the view that it is the responsibility of art and literature to challenge society’s values.
8021_w21_qp_11.10: The usefulness of household appliances and furniture is more important than their appearance. Discuss.

8021_w21_qp_12.1: Animal welfare is as important as human rights in a civilised society. Discuss.
8021_w21_qp_12.2: To what extent does love of your country contribute to making it a stronger nation?
8021_w21_qp_12.3: Hobbies are a very important part of people’s lives. Discuss.
8021_w21_qp_12.4: In school, non-academic subjects are just as important as academic ones. Discuss.
8021_w21_qp_12.5: The increased use of bicycles can provide an answer to the world’s environmental problems. To what extent do you agree?
8021_w21_qp_12.6: Evaluate the importance of mathematics in the world as you experience it.
8021_w21_qp_12.7: Surveillance by the state threatens the rights of the individual citizen. To what extent is this true in your country?
8021_w21_qp_12.8: Examine how the literature of your country influences people’s feelings and attitudes.
8021_w21_qp_12.9: Stricter regulation is the only way to guarantee the truthfulness of advertisements. To what extent do you agree?
8021_w21_qp_12.10: Evaluate the extent to which music reflects society.

8021_w21_qp_13.1: Assess the impact of unrestricted importing and exporting of goods and services between countries.
8021_w21_qp_13.2: To what extent do flags unify or divide people?
8021_w21_qp_13.3: Men and women who play the same sport should receive equal pay. Discuss.
8021_w21_qp_13.4: As time passes, the world will end up with too much water. Examine this statement.
8021_w21_qp_13.5: Security cameras are essential to keep our towns and cities safe. To what extent do you agree?
8021_w21_qp_13.6: To what extent has the use of mathematics positively changed the world we live in?
8021_w21_qp_13.7: Parks and other green spaces in cities are unnecessary. Discuss.
8021_w21_qp_13.8: To what extent does your country’s heritage restrict its development in the modern world?
8021_w21_qp_13.9: Films and live performances based on books can never replace the joy of reading. Discuss.
8021_w21_qp_13.10: Assess the view that literature from the past has no relevance to modern life.

8021_w22_qp_11.1: International sporting events no longer represent the true nature of sport. Discuss
8021_w22_qp_11.2: To what extent is the main priority of education to teach people to read?
8021_w22_qp_11.3: Evaluate the benefits and difficulties of working from home.
8021_w22_qp_11.4: People should always base their actions on the opinion of experts. Discuss.
8021_w22_qp_11.5: The work of scientists should never be restricted. Evaluate this statement.
8021_w22_qp_11.6: To what extent do you agree that computer technology has decreased our quality of life?
8021_w22_qp_11.7: Evaluate the advantages and disadvantages of mathematical modelling.
8021_w22_qp_11.8: Assess the significance of superheroes in our lives.
8021_w22_qp_11.9: Theatrical plays written before the twenty-first century have no relevance to life today. Discuss.
8021_w22_qp_11.10: Printed newspapers, magazines, books and comics are no longer needed in our digital age. Discuss.

8021_w22_qp_12.1: Circumstances produce great leaders when they are needed. Discuss.
8021_w22_qp_12.2: Evaluate the importance of the architecture of your country in understanding its history.
8021_w22_qp_12.3: Giving people complete freedom of speech can cause more harm than good. Discuss.
8021_w22_qp_12.4: To what extent have computer games had a positive impact on people?
8021_w22_qp_12.5: Assess the issues which some countries have in achieving and maintaining an adequate food supply.
8021_w22_qp_12.6: A careful diet is the most important part of a healthy life. Discuss.
8021_w22_qp_12.7: The digital book is never likely to replace the printed one. How far do you agree?
8021_w22_qp_12.8: Censorship of the arts can never be justified. Discuss.
8021_w22_qp_12.9: English is the world’s most common language. To what extent is this desirable?
8021_w22_qp_12.10: Cartoons and animations have no serious purpose. To what extent do you agree?

8021_w22_qp_13.1: Protest groups have every right to adopt disruptive tactics. Examine this statement.
8021_w22_qp_13.2: To what extent has government enabled your country to develop and prosper?
8021_w22_qp_13.3: To what extent is freedom of movement a fundamental human right?
8021_w22_qp_13.4: Science has caused more problems than it has solved. Discuss.
8021_w22_qp_13.5: To what extent have high-rise buildings improved city life?
8021_w22_qp_13.6: Evaluate the extent to which the use of mathematics is essential in the world today.
8021_w22_qp_13.7: To what extent has advertising been improved by digital technology?
8021_w22_qp_13.8: Wild creatures have a special appeal to the artistic imagination. Examine the basis for this statement with reference to any poems or novels you have read.
8021_w22_qp_13.9: Non-verbal communication can be very effective. To what extent do you agree with this judgement?
8021_w22_qp_13.10: Involvement in performing arts, such as learning a musical instrument or performing in a play, can benefit people’s lives. Discuss.

8021_w23_qp_11.1: When preparing for a career, work experience is more important than academic study. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_11.2: Assess the challenges for societies where there are many faiths.
8021_w23_qp_11.3: To what extent would the even distribution of wealth bring social harmony to your country?
8021_w23_qp_11.4: Computer technology has made everyday life safer for everyone. To what extent do you agree?
8021_w23_qp_11.5: Humans should do everything possible to save all endangered species. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_11.6: Electric cars will be the most common form of road transport in the future. To what extent do you agree?
8021_w23_qp_11.7: To what extent have streaming services benefited the film industry?
8021_w23_qp_11.8: Television dramas about historical events are a good way to learn about the past. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_11.9: News should only be published or broadcast with the consent of those it is about. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_11.10: To what extent does literature reveal what it is to be human?

8021_w23_qp_12.1: All young people in your country should spend time serving in the armed forces. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_12.2: To what extent do the personal characteristics of politicians influence how people vote?
8021_w23_qp_12.3: It is important to limit how long someone works each day. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_12.4: A country’s government should do everything possible to control the spread of infectious diseases. To what extent do you agree?
8021_w23_qp_12.5: The protection of the underwater environment should be the world’s most urgent environmental concern. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_12.6: Living a longer life is not always desirable. To what extent do you agree?
8021_w23_qp_12.7: The problem of the global food shortage will never be solved. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_12.8: People should have the freedom to wear whatever clothes they choose. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_12.9: To what extent has society become too influenced by advertising?
8021_w23_qp_12.10: To what extent is it important to keep traditional arts alive in your country?

8021_w23_qp_13.1: To what extent do you agree that rich corporations are now more powerful than governments?
8021_w23_qp_13.2: Assess whether the teaching of speaking and listening skills should be given priority in schools.
8021_w23_qp_13.3: It is never justifiable to use animals for testing. Evaluate this statement.
8021_w23_qp_13.4: To what extent should people fear developments in artificial intelligence (AI)?
8021_w23_qp_13.5: Evaluate the view that there is no place for creativity in scientific research.
8021_w23_qp_13.6: There are no benefits to space tourism. To what extent do you agree?
8021_w23_qp_13.7: Understanding the target audience is the most important consideration for a journalist when writing for a newspaper or magazine. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_13.8: Arts and crafts play no role in maintaining the heritage of your country. Evaluate this statement.
8021_w23_qp_13.9: The main responsibility of museums is to educate people about their history. Discuss.
8021_w23_qp_13.10: To what extent does a good story need to have believable characters?

8021_w24_qp_11.1: Evaluate the view that horror movies no longer have the impact they once did.
8021_w24_qp_11.2: Assess whether travelling by aeroplane is the best form of travel.
8021_w24_qp_11.3: People should reduce the amount of meat they eat to protect the environment. Discuss.
8021_w24_qp_11.4: Improvements in society are more likely to be achieved by groups rather than individuals. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_w24_qp_11.5: Assess the view that comedy can never successfully deal with serious topics.
8021_w24_qp_11.6: People who obey the law have nothing to fear from surveillance. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_w24_qp_11.7: Creative arts have no value other than as a leisure activity. Discuss.
8021_w24_qp_11.8: Schools should encourage students to be competitive to prepare them for adulthood. Discuss.
8021_w24_qp_11.9: Essential workers are not appreciated enough in your country. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_w24_qp_11.10: Evaluate the effectiveness of the treatment of criminals in your country.

8021_w24_qp_12.1: To what extent should people be proud of the nation they belong to?
8021_w24_qp_12.2: Mathematics has more importance in the classroom than in the outside world. Discuss.
8021_w24_qp_12.3: To what extent is animal welfare everyone’s responsibility?
8021_w24_qp_12.4: Evaluate how important it is for young people to spend more time with their families.
8021_w24_qp_12.5: Assess whether the novel or poetry is more effective in expressing how we experience life.
8021_w24_qp_12.6: Passengers should not have to pay for public transport in your country. Discuss.
8021_w24_qp_12.7: Evaluate the importance of the arts such as painting, drama and music in education.
8021_w24_qp_12.8: Assess the view that sport should be about enjoyment rather than winning.
8021_w24_qp_12.9: To what extent is surveillance in public places essential in your country?
8021_w24_qp_12.10: Examine the view that live theatre is not an accessible art form in your country.

8021_w24_qp_13.1: To what extent are disadvantaged people prevented from participating in sport?
8021_w24_qp_13.2: Evaluate the usefulness of science fiction in solving current problems.
8021_w24_qp_13.3: No nation can be truly happy unless all its citizens are equal. Discuss.
8021_w24_qp_13.4: Telling the truth is always the right thing to do. To what extent do you agree with this advice?
8021_w24_qp_13.5: To what extent do individuals have the power to influence how your country is governed?
8021_w24_qp_13.6: It is increasingly important that people have access to frozen fruit and vegetables. Discuss.
8021_w24_qp_13.7: To what extent do online appointments with patients improve the way doctors provide care?
8021_w24_qp_13.8: To what extent do you agree that individuals should be free to choose their work or school hours?
8021_w24_qp_13.9: The impact of music on people’s lives is always positive. Discuss.
8021_w24_qp_13.10: To what extent is advertising a form of art?

8021_w25_qp_11.1: International organisations are of essential importance in today’s world. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_w25_qp_11.2: Technological advances will make learning to speak other languages unnecessary. Evaluate to what extent this statement is true.
8021_w25_qp_11.3: To what extent is health education effective in your country?
8021_w25_qp_11.4: Evaluate the extent to which literature can change how people think.
8021_w25_qp_11.5: Traditional arts and crafts are not appreciated enough in your country. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_w25_qp_11.6: The desire to make a lot of money is having a positive effect on today’s world. Discuss.
8021_w25_qp_11.7: Evaluate the view that space exploration should be publicly funded.
8021_w25_qp_11.8: To what extent has digital media negatively impacted attendance at live performances?
8021_w25_qp_11.9: Human rights are still not given enough importance in today’s world. Discuss.
8021_w25_qp_11.10: To what extent are the problems of water pollution being successfully addressed in your country?

8021_w25_qp_12.1: Tourism ensures the survival of remote communities. To what extent is this true in your country?
8021_w25_qp_12.2: Successful leaders have to make unpopular decisions. Discuss.
8021_w25_qp_12.3: Human migration from one place to another brings many benefits. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_w25_qp_12.4: To what extent does social media enable young people to communicate more positively?
8021_w25_qp_12.5: The study of history focuses too much on what people have done wrong. Discuss.
8021_w25_qp_12.6: Financial security is the responsibility of the individual. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_w25_qp_12.7: What an individual chooses to eat and drink is of no concern to anyone else. Evaluate this statement.
8021_w25_qp_12.8: Visual forms of art express emotions in ways that written words cannot achieve. Discuss.
8021_w25_qp_12.9: The biggest concern about climate change is the threat that it creates for the people of the world. To what extent do you agree with this view?
8021_w25_qp_12.10: Songs have the power to divide as well as unite people. Discuss.

8021_w25_qp_13.1: The government should protect the health of all citizens in your country. To what extent do you agree with this view?
8021_w25_qp_13.2: Space travel and exploration should be managed by private companies rather than governments. Discuss this view.
8021_w25_qp_13.3: Books inspire the minds of children. To what extent do you agree with this claim?
8021_w25_qp_13.4: Designers should always ensure that what they create is visually attractive. To what extent do you agree with this statement?
8021_w25_qp_13.5: Spending on foreign aid should be a priority for wealthy countries. Discuss.
8021_w25_qp_13.6: To what extent is it desirable for all people in your country to earn the same amount of money?
8021_w25_qp_13.7: Ageing populations bring many benefits to society. To what extent do you agree?
8021_w25_qp_13.8: To what extent should environmental impacts influence what people choose to wear?
8021_w25_qp_13.9: It is unacceptable to monitor people using information obtained from their mobile devices. Discuss.
8021_w25_qp_13.10: Any media with disturbing content should always begin with a clear warning for viewers. Discuss.
